notes: Review a diff and talk back to the agent that wrote it. Comment on any line in the Changes panel (⌘⇧G), then ⌘⇧⏎ sends every comment straight into that worktree's agent — no retyping your objections from memory, no copy-paste. Plus a new quota gauge in the sidebar showing the active tab's agent and how much of its limit is left, read natively per provider.
